top matches.text: Providers or prospective providers may conduct the testing in real world conditions only where all of the following conditions are met: (g) the subjects of the testing in real world conditions who are persons belonging to vulnerable groups due to their age or disability, are appropriately protected;

In particular, the market surveillance authorities shall indicate whether the non-compliance is due to one or more of the following: (b) a failure of a high-risk AI system to meet requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2;
